"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "In versions of Tornado prior to 6.5.5, the only limit on the number of parts in `multipart/form-data` is the `max_body_size` setting (default 100MB). Since parsing occurs synchronously on the main thread, this creates the possibility of denial-of-service due to the cost of parsing very large multipart bodies with many parts. \n\nTornado 6.5.5 introduces new limits on the size and complexity of multipart bodies, including a default limit of 100 parts per request. These limits are configurable if needed; see `tornado.httputil.ParseMultipartConfig`. It is also now possible to disable `multipart/form-data` parsing entirely if it is not required for the application.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00375, "percentile": 0.29532}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-12T14:19:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-31958"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-11T20:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-03-12T14:19:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31958", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/commit/119a195e290c43ad2d63a2cf012c29d43d6ed839", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/releases/tag/v6.5.5", "https://lists.debian.org/debian-lts-announce/2026/04/msg00000.html", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/tornado/PYSEC-2026-140.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado", "summary": "Tornado is vulnerable to DoS due to too many multipart parts", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:51:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.5.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tornado is vulnerable to DoS due to too many multipart parts
